message:
fix(beads): bd 0.62 agent state flow + target DB routing (GH#3324, GH#3356)

Fix-merge of two overlapping PRs that fix agent state management for
beads v0.62 compatibility:

From PR #3324 (junlov): bd >= 0.62.0 removes the supported bd agent
state writer. UpdateAgentState now writes exclusively through the
description field. Add ResolveAgentState() that prefers description
over the legacy structured column. Update all reader sites (status,
lifecycle, witness, deacon) to use ResolveAgentState. Also add
overrideDoltEnvFromBeadsDir to prevent stale parent-shell Dolt ports
from misrouting bd commands when targeting another rig's .beads dir.

From PR #3356 (Henry-E): Resolve the concrete target DB via
ResolveRoutingTarget before writing agent state, preventing cross-DB
routing when the agent bead lives in a different beads dir than the
caller's BEADS_DIR.

Reconciled approach: description-only write (from #3324) with target DB
resolution (from #3356), plus all reader-side changes and 8 new tests.
